Notice Of Motion To Seal
Off Calendar Aug-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT DANIELLE LANE, M.D. and DANIELLE E. LANE, M.D., INC. dba Lane Fertility Institute Motion To Seal, as follows:

Defendants Danielle Lane, M.D. and Danielle E. Lane, M.D., Inc. dba Lane Fertility Institute's Motion To Seal is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and the motion complies with Cal. R. Ct. 2.550.

Counsel for the defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which sets forth the express findings required by Cal. R. Ct. 2.550(d) and specifies the exhibit to be sealed, the title of the document that attaches the exhibit and the date it was filed, and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
